author: @NorthernKitty
text: Just wondering, is it a sign someone is far too dependent on electronic gadgets in their life if they feel compelled to dive after the batteries Luke tossed whilst exclaiming, "Noooooo, my precioussss...."?  Asking for a friend.

author: @sofa-lofa4241
text:
Good to see you back Luke,
A lot of people pay ridiculous amounts of money to sit at home or in a gym to do 'resistance training' on a bike that goes nowhere, 
I think it's much better to get out on a real bike in the fresh air and I like the idea of putting the energy to good use

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Thanks! Good to be back! Yes, I agree, nothing like doing the real thing!
